title: The First Message
content: Emma looked at her phone for the tenth time that evening. She wanted to send Leo a message, but she was nervous. They had talked only once at the bookstore. Finally, she smiled and typed, “Hi, it was nice meeting you today.” She pressed send before she could change her mind. A few minutes later, her phone buzzed. Leo replied, “I was hoping to hear from you.” Emma laughed softly. One simple message turned into a long conversation. They talked about books, music, and dreams until midnight. It was only the first message, but it felt like the beginning of something special.
